title: Honey Mustard Chicken with Rice and Vegetables
instructions: Preheat oven to 375°F (190°C).
Mix mustard and honey together to form a glaze.
Season chicken breasts with salt, pepper, and garlic powder.
Brush the honey mustard glaze over the chicken breasts.
Bake chicken in the oven for 25 minutes or until cooked through.
While chicken is baking, cook rice according to package instructions.
Sauté vegetables in olive oil until tender.
Serve baked chicken over rice with a side of sautéed vegetables.

title: Shrimp and Vegetable Stir-fry with Ramen Noodles
instructions: Cook ramen noodles according to package instructions and drain.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add peeled shrimp and cook until pink and opaque.
Add vegetables and stir-fry until tender-crisp.
Add cooked ramen noodles to the skillet.
Season with salt, pepper, and preferred seasoning.
Toss everything together and heat through before serving.

title: Bacon and Gouda Grilled Cheese Sandwich
instructions: Cook bacon in a skillet until crispy. Drain on paper towels.
Butter one side of each slice of honey wheat bread.
Place one slice, butter side down, on a skillet over medium heat.
Add sliced gouda cheese and cooked bacon on top.
Top with the second slice of bread, butter side up.
Cook until bread is golden brown and cheese is melted, flipping once.
Remove from skillet, slice, and serve warm.
